form.formComment: Won two starts back over 525m at Taree Super Track. Last start she finished 4th over 515m at The Gardens beaten 5.5 lengths (30.19) behind Digger Sure Can in a Grade 5 on April 10. Draw likely to suit. Solid showing expected.

formComments.comment: Won two starts back over 525m at Taree Super Track. Last start she finished 4th over 515m at The Gardens beaten 5.5 lengths (30.19) behind Digger Sure Can in a Grade 5 on April 10. Draw likely to suit. Solid showing expected.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (30.62) when sixth over 520m at this track in a Grade 5. Goes well out of this box with a win and three minors. Looks well placed and should feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly and was slow to begin.

form.formComment: Unplaced in six tries at this track. Last start 4th over 520m at Nowra. Others hold stronger claims.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th in a Grade 5 on April 11 over 515m at The Gardens behind Fascinate Suzie beaten 9 lengths (30.27). Has a strong record from box 5, including two wins. Go close.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels galloped on rounding the home turn, stumbled and lost ground.

form.formComment: Finished second last start (30.00) at big odds over 520m at this track. Wide draw here. Looks to have the job ahead.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when third (22.70) at big odds over 400m at Maitland. Has a decent strike-rate from the draw and can measure up.
